about.ai_desc.en: OpenConstructionERP includes optional AI-powered tools — quick estimation from text descriptions, smart cost suggestions, and BOQ chat assistant. These features require an API key from a provider of your choice (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google). AI is always opt-in: it only activates when you configure it, and you decide what data to send. Without an API key, all other features work fully offline.
about.ai_desc.mn: OpenConstructionERP includes сонголтын AI-powered tools — quick тооцоолол -аас text тайлбарууд, smart өртөг suggestions, ба BOQ chat assistant. Эдгээр features require API key -аас provider -н таны choice (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google). AI нь үргэлж opt--д: it зөвхөн activates хэзээ та тохируулах it, ба та decide юу data хүртэл илгээх. -гүй API key, бүх бусад features work fully offline.

about.cap.boq_desc.en: Create detailed BOQ with hierarchical sections, positions, assemblies, markups (overhead, profit, VAT), and automatic totals. Supports DIN 276, NRM 1/2, MasterFormat, and custom classification systems.
about.cap.boq_desc.mn: Үүсгэх detailed BOQ -тай hierarchical хэсгүүд, байрлалууд, assemblies, markups (overhead, profit, VAT), ба automatic нийт. Supports DIN 276, NRM 1/2, MasterFormat, ба захиалгат classification systems.

about.cap.catalog_desc.en: 7,000+ resources — materials, equipment, labor, operators, and utilities. Build reusable assemblies (composite rates) from catalog items and apply them directly to BOQ positions.
about.cap.catalog_desc.mn: 7,000+ нөөц — материал, тоног төхөөрөмж, хөдөлмөр, operators, ба utilities. Build reusable assemblies (composite тарифууд) -аас каталог зүйлс ба хэрэглэх them directly хүртэл BOQ байрлалууд.

about.cap.costmodel_desc.en: Track budgets over time with Earned Value Management (SPI, CPI), S-curve visualization, cash flow projections, cost snapshots, and what-if scenario modeling for informed decision-making.
about.cap.costmodel_desc.mn: Хянах төсвүүд over time -тай Earned Утга Management (SPI, CPI), S-curve visualization, cash flow projections, өртөг snapshots, ба юу-хэрэв scenario modeling -д зориулсан informed decision-making.

about.cap.costs_desc.en: 55,000+ cost items across 30 regional databases worldwide. Add your own rates, import from Excel, or build a custom database from scratch.
about.cap.costs_desc.mn: 55,000+ өртөг зүйлс across 30 regional databases worldwide. Нэмэх таны own тарифууд, импортлох -аас Excel, эсвэл build захиалгат database -аас scratch.

about.cap.import_desc.en: Full support for GAEB XML (X83), Excel, and CSV import/export. Generate professional PDF reports. Seamlessly integrate with your existing tools and workflows.
about.cap.import_desc.mn: Full support -д зориулсан GAEB XML (X83), Excel, ба CSV импортлох/экспортлох. Үүсгэх мэргэжлийн PDF тайлан. Seamlessly integrate -тай таны existing tools ба workflows.

about.cap.schedule_desc.en: Create project schedules with CPM critical path calculation, interactive Gantt charts, Monte Carlo risk analysis, resource assignment, and auto-generation of activities from your BOQ.
about.cap.schedule_desc.mn: Үүсгэх төсөл хуваарь -тай CPM critical path calculation, interactive Gantt charts, Monte Carlo эрсдэл analysis, нөөц assignment, ба auto-generation -н үйл ажиллагаа -аас таны BOQ.

about.cap.tendering_desc.en: Create tender packages with scope and positions, distribute to subcontractors, collect and compare bids side-by-side in a price mirror, and make award decisions based on data.
about.cap.tendering_desc.mn: Үүсгэх тендер packages -тай scope ба байрлалууд, distribute хүртэл туслан гүйцэтгэгчид, collect ба compare саналууд side--аар-side -д үнэ mirror, ба make award decisions based дээр data.

about.cap.validation_desc.en: Built-in quality engine automatically checks for missing quantities, zero prices, duplicate positions, classification compliance, and rate anomalies — with a traffic-light dashboard.
about.cap.validation_desc.mn: Built--д чанар engine automatically checks -д зориулсан missing тоо хэмжээ, zero үнэ, хуулбарлах байрлалууд, classification дагалт, ба тариф anomalies — -тай traffic-light dashboard.

about.intro.en: OpenConstructionERP is a modern platform for construction cost management. It covers the full estimation workflow — from creating a bill of quantities to tendering and bid comparison. Designed for professionals worldwide, it supports international standards and works in 20 languages.
about.intro.mn: OpenConstructionERP нь modern platform -д зориулсан барилгын өртөг management. It covers full тооцоолол workflow — -аас үүсгэж байна bill -н тоо хэмжээ хүртэл тендер ба санал comparison. Designed -д зориулсан professionals worldwide, it supports international standards ба works -д 20 хэлүүд.

about.intro2.en: Unlike traditional commercial solutions, OpenConstructionERP runs entirely on your computer. Your project data never leaves your machine — you have full ownership and control. The source code is open and auditable, so you always know exactly what the software does.
about.intro2.mn: Unlike traditional commercial solutions, OpenConstructionERP runs entirely дээр таны computer. Таны төсөл data хэзээ ч үгүй leaves таны machine — та байх full ownership ба control. source code нь нээх ба auditable, so та үргэлж know exactly юу software хийдэг.

about.title.en: Professional construction cost estimation — free and open source
about.title.mn: Мэргэжлийн барилгын өртөг тооцоолол — үнэгүй ба нээх source

about.who_desc.en: OpenConstructionERP is designed for anyone involved in construction cost management — whether you work on residential projects or large-scale infrastructure, in-house or as a consultant.
about.who_desc.mn: OpenConstructionERP нь designed -д зориулсан anyone involved -д барилгын өртөг management — whether та work дээр residential төслүүд эсвэл large-scale infrastructure, -д-house эсвэл болгон consultant.

about.why_1.en: Construction cost data is one of the most valuable assets a company owns. With proprietary software, your data is often locked inside formats you cannot control. If the vendor raises prices, changes terms, or discontinues the product — you may lose access to years of work.
about.why_1.mn: Барилгын өртөг data нь one -н most valuable assets company owns. -тай proprietary software, таны data нь ихэвчлэн locked inside formats та чадахгүй control. Хэрэв нийлүүлэгч raises үнэ, changes terms, эсвэл discontinues product — та болно lose access хүртэл years -н work.

about.why_2.en: OpenConstructionERP takes a different approach. Your data is stored in open formats (SQLite, JSON, CSV) on your own hardware. You can export everything at any time. The source code is publicly auditable under AGPL-3.0, so there are no hidden data transfers, no telemetry, and no surprises.
about.why_2.mn: OpenConstructionERP takes ялгаатай approach. Таны data нь stored -д нээх formats (SQLite, JSON, CSV) дээр таны own hardware. Та чадна экспортлох everything -д дурын time. source code нь publicly auditable under AGPL-3.0, so тэнд нь үгүй hidden data transfers, үгүй telemetry, ба үгүй surprises.

about.why_3.en: The platform is modular — install only what you need. Community modules extend functionality without bloating the core. And because it runs locally, it works offline and performs fast even with large projects.
about.why_3.mn: platform нь modular — install зөвхөн юу та need. Community модулиуд extend functionality -гүй bloating core. Ба because it runs locally, it works offline ба performs fast хүртэл -тай large төслүүд.

ai.advisor_desc.en: Ask questions about costs, materials, and pricing — from your database and AI knowledge
ai.advisor_desc.mn: Ask questions тухай өртгүүд, материал, ба үнэ тогтоолт — -аас таны database ба AI knowledge

ai.cad_info.en: CAD/BIM files (.rvt, .ifc, .dwg, .dgn) require the DDC converter to be installed. Elements will be extracted and used to generate a cost estimate. Download converters from GitHub and place them in ~/.openestimator/converters/.
ai.cad_info.mn: CAD/BIM files (.rvt,.ifc,.dwg,.dgn) require DDC converter хүртэл байх installed. Элементүүд болно байх extracted ба used хүртэл үүсгэх өртөг тооцоо. Татах converters -аас GitHub ба place them -д ~/.openestimator/converters/.

ai.paste_info.mn: Auto-detects tab-separated, semicolon, эсвэл comma-delimited data. AI болно parse ба structure таны data руу тооцоо зүйлс.

assemblies.what_are_assemblies.en: Assemblies are reusable cost recipes that combine multiple resources (materials, labor, equipment) into a single composite rate. For example, a \"Reinforced Concrete Wall\" assembly includes concrete, rebar, formwork, and labor. Apply assemblies to BOQ positions to auto-populate component costs.
assemblies.what_are_assemblies.mn: Assemblies нь reusable өртөг recipes тэр combine олон нөөц (материал, хөдөлмөр, тоног төхөөрөмж) руу ганц composite тариф. -д зориулсан example, \\\"Reinforced Concrete Wall\\\" assembly includes concrete, rebar, formwork, ба хөдөлмөр. Хэрэглэх assemblies хүртэл BOQ байрлалууд хүртэл auto-populate component өртгүүд.

bim.getting_started_desc.en: Upload element data (CSV/Excel) and optional 3D geometry (DAE) from your CAD converter to visualize building models in 3D. Elements can be linked to BOQ positions for quantity verification.
bim.getting_started_desc.mn: Байршуулах элемент data (CSV/Excel) ба сонголтын 3D geometry (DAE) -аас таны CAD converter хүртэл visualize барилга загварууд -д 3D. Элементүүд чадна байх linked хүртэл BOQ байрлалууд -д зориулсан тоо хэмжээ verification.

bim.landing_feat_3d_desc.mn: Interactive Three.js viewer -тай storey шүүж байна, discipline coloring, ба элемент selection.

bim.landing_feat_boq_desc.en: Connect BIM elements to cost items for automated quantity verification and 5D take-off.
bim.landing_feat_boq_desc.mn: Холбогдох BIM элементүүд хүртэл өртөг зүйлс -д зориулсан automated тоо хэмжээ verification ба 5D take-off.

bim.landing_feat_format_desc.mn: IFC боловсруулсан instantly. RVT via DDC cad2data. CSV/Excel -д зориулсан pre-converted data.

bim.landing_feat_qty_desc.mn: Define rules хүртэл extract area, volume, ба length — хэрэглэх хүртэл таны entire загвар -д once.

Үүсгэх package -аас BOQ, нэмэх туслан гүйцэтгэгч саналууд, тэгээд use comparison table хүртэл identify best offer. Нэмэх 2+ саналууд хүртэл see side--аар-side analysis.
